title: ffi/client.rs: FFI client has no proxy support — .onion relays unreachable from Flutter
description: client_connect() in ffi/src/api/client.rs calls transport::connect_with_retry(relay_url, identity, accept_invalid_certs, None), hardcoding proxy=None. There is no proxy parameter in the FFI API surface. Flutter users who want to connect through Tor (socks5h://127.0.0.1:9050) cannot do so via the FFI layer. This is a missing feature that will generate issues from users on privacy-sensitive platforms (Android + Orbot). The proxy parameter needs to be exposed as an optional String on client_connect before the API surface fossilizes.
